mapper.insert: INSERT INTO error_logs(log_id, type, message, stack, url, method, status_code, component, props, user_id, user_role, `timestamp`, created_at) VALUES(#{logId}, #{type}, #{message}, #{stack}, #{url}, #{method}, #{statusCode}, #{component}, #{props}, #{userId}, #{userRole}, #{timestamp}, NOW())

INSERT INTO error_logs(log_id, type, message, stack, url, method, status_code, component, props, user_id, user_role, `timestamp`, created_at) VALUES
(#{log.logId}, #{log.type}, #{log.message}, #{log.stack}, #{log.url}, #{log.method}, #{log.statusCode}, #{log.component}, #{log.props}, #{log.userId}, #{log.userRole}, #{log.timestamp}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM error_logs ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM error_logs WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM error_logs WHERE `timestamp` >= #{start} AND `timestamp` <= #{end} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM error_logs WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM error_logs WHERE type = #{type}
